about.description: I am a highly motivated 4th-year student and fresh graduate with a strong passion for software engineering. With a solid foundation in Computer Science and hands-on experience building modern, scalable applications, I thrive in fast-paced environments where I can learn and contribute to real-world products. I am actively looking for opportunities to kickstart my professional career and make an impact.

projects.headerDesc: A showcase of my finest work. Each project represents a unique challenge solved through elegant engineering and thoughtful design.

labels.architectureDesc: The application follows a Clean Architecture pattern, decoupling the UI from the business logic and data access layers. This allowed for independent scaling and easier testing of the core algorithms.
labels.databaseDesc: Designed a normalized database schema to handle high-volume relational data, utilizing stored procedures and indexes to optimize complex queries.
labels.aiDesc: To provide intelligent insights, I integrated a local LLM (Ollama) which acts as an assistant. Users can type natural language queries and the AI translates it into SQL dynamically.
labels.lessonsDesc1: Learned how to balance the need for microservices with the overhead they introduce. Sometimes a well-structured monolith is the right choice for V1.
labels.lessonsDesc2: Implementing strict prompt guardrails was necessary to prevent the LLM from generating destructive SQL queries.

news-pay-winform.title: NewsPay - Royalty Management System
news-pay-winform.shortDesc: A comprehensive royalty management application built on .NET Windows Forms, featuring an integrated offline AI for plagiarism detection and a smart accounting assistant.
news-pay-winform.challenge: Integrating an offline LLM to provide secure, internet-free analysis of articles for plagiarism and accounting data extraction without compromising on performance.
news-pay-winform.solution: Used Ollama to run the Qwen2.5 model locally, bridging it with the .NET application to process large text and query the SQL Server database dynamically.
news-pay-winform.result: Provided journalists and accountants with an intelligent tool that automates royalty calculations and strictly protects internal data through 100% offline AI processing.

editorial-desk-web.title: Editorial Desk Web Platform
editorial-desk-web.shortDesc: A modern web-based solution for editorial offices to manage articles, calculate royalties, and deduct personal income taxes, synchronized with the Winform system.
editorial-desk-web.challenge: Ensuring 100% data consistency and business logic alignment with the legacy Winform application while providing a fast, modern responsive web interface.
editorial-desk-web.solution: Built a robust Node.js backend to connect to the shared SQL Server and developed a responsive React frontend utilizing Chart.js for real-time multidimensional data visualization.
editorial-desk-web.result: Streamlined the 5-step editorial approval process and enabled real-time dashboard analytics for quick financial insights across the organization.

flower-shop-mvc.title: FLOWERSHOP (PHP MVC)
flower-shop-mvc.shortDesc: A fully functional e-commerce platform for selling flowers, built from scratch using pure PHP, MVC architecture, and .htaccess routing.
flower-shop-mvc.challenge: Implementing full e-commerce capabilities and an Admin CRUD dashboard without relying on modern heavy frameworks.
flower-shop-mvc.solution: Architected a custom MVC pattern with strict PDO MySQL bindings to prevent SQL injection, and optimized .htaccess for clean routing.
flower-shop-mvc.result: Delivered a lightweight system with complete features: login/register, product management, cart, checkout, order management, and statistics.
